single_value_update.description: Changing a single value cell triggers correct cascade recalculation

formula_update.description: Changing a cell's formula updates its value and propagates to dependents

batch_update.description: Multiple simultaneous changes are applied atomically with correct evaluation order

dependency_chain.description: Linear dependency chains evaluate in the correct order

parallel_siblings.description: Cells at the same topological depth follow deterministic ordering rules

diamond_graph.description: Multiple paths from source to sink are handled without false diagnostics

circular_dependency.description: True cycles are detected and reported; affected cells enter error state

conditional_with_error.description: Conditional functions handle error branches correctly per short-circuit semantics

precision_chain.description: Arithmetic chains preserve correct precision through intermediate calculations

type_transition.description: Cells changing between formula and value types maintain correct graph state
